description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a large, dark gable roof and a prominent central chimney. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, a paved driveway, and a backyard featuring a swimming pool and patio area. Mature trees and flowering shrubs are strategically placed around the property, providing shade and visual interest. The main entrance is accessible via a walkway leading from the driveway, and a detached garage is visible to one side. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern along the front and sides, with a modest porch at the entry. The overall design is simple and functional, characteristic of mid-century suburban homes.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, central chimney, detached garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and a manicured lawn.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrance, central chimney, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the roof structure, backyard pool, patio, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear and side view displaying the full length of the house, backyard pool, and dense tree coverage at the back.
description_view_3: View from the backyard, focusing on the pool, patio area, and the rear facade of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
